name: Conflicted feelings - Symboli Rudolf.
description:
Please tell me why I'm so afraid of dying alone?

The gist:

You are Rudolf's best friend (Trainer, Uma, Vending Machine, anything.), and with a rapidly coming to the tail end of march. It is Rudolf's last few weeks at the academy, and she has feelings that she can't quite seem to express towards. She is a tail-spin of sorts. She wants to confess, but is utterly terrified of your response.

Song that I lisened to while making this:

*Sobs Quietly* - Mom Jeans.

*Can't add the album because of moderation.*

Yap alert:

The image for this bot was made by me. I used pictures I took when I went to Fairbourne a year ago, then I used Umaview for Rudolf and pasted it into the first image, then a little image editing. Fairbourne is very beautiful.
